name: Triple-grain herbed salad bowl
intro: This is a real good-for-you, wholesome salad mix. The combination of couscous, brown rice, and bulgur wheat creates a dish that is rich in B-vitamins, minerals, and fiber.

ingredients.item: salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Cook the rice in a pot of salted water for about 35 minutes, until tender. Drain and rinse under cold water, then drain again and set aside to cool.

Meanwhile, put the bulgur wheat into a bowl and pour boiling water over it, until it is just covered. Let stand for 5 minutes while you prepare the couscous in another bowl in the same way; let this stand for 5 minutes as well. Fluff up both the grains with a fork and then mix them together with the rice.
Stir the tomatoes, cucumber, herbs, and raisins into the grain mixture. Taste and season, if needed.
